description_long: This house is nestled within a rocky, forested landscape, surrounded by large boulders and dense tropical vegetation. The structure itself is rectangular with a flat roof, featuring a modernist facade with clean lines and a symmetrical arrangement of windows. The exterior walls are light-colored, contrasting with the dark rocks and lush greenery that envelop the building. The house appears to have two stories, with prominent windows on both levels, and a central entryway facing a small manicured lawn. The setting gives the impression of a secluded, contemporary residence integrated into a natural environment. The overall composition blends architectural elements with organic forms, creating a striking visual juxtaposition.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by large rocks and dense tropical plants, blending contemporary architecture with a natural landscape.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, central entryway, and manicured lawn framed by large rocks and dense greenery.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the house partially obscured by boulders and tropical plants, with more of the building's left side visible.
description_view_2: Rear view with the house mostly hidden behind rocks and palm trees, only the upper windows and roofline are visible.
description_view_3: Angled view highlighting the right side of the house, with the entryway and windows partially visible through the surrounding vegetation and rocks.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a simple door, no porch, and minimal decorative elements, framed by rocks and greenery.
